title: D-L9-RECONCILE — Bring SR L9 operational records current with rule pipeline arc
description: Append schema-bound DEC entries and FU entries to bring SR's L9 operational records (.roadmap/decision-log.json and .roadmap/follow-up-register.json) current with the rule pipeline foundation arc (D-0..D-3), the FU block (FU-D-1..FU-D-5x), and D-COMMS-1/D-COMMS-2 cross-chat infrastructure. Per the canonical architecture topology, L9 operational records ARE schema-bound. The records have not been updated since 2026-05-18 (decision log) and 2026-05-21 (follow-up register), pre-dating substantial portfolio governance work. Hybrid coverage path (c): file DEC entries for rule promotion milestones (the enterprise-significant events), not individual deliverables; file FU entries for working-model rules pending automated promotion plus the future schema-bump candidate. Closure docs handle granular per-deliverable history. This deliverable establishes that L9 records ARE intended-canonical for the rule pipeline, not vestigial. Pattern reusable for every future rule promotion arc.

outputs.description: Append 7 DEC entries to .roadmap/decision-log.json capturing rule pipeline foundation adoption + 5 rule lifecycle milestones (4 automated promotions + 1 terminal-by-design at human-loop) + 1 forward-pointing arc initiation. Each DEC conforms to decision-log.schema.v2.json #/definitions/decision with all 9 required fields plus tags, impactedDeliverables, evidence, externalLinks. category=tooling matches existing 6 DEC pattern; impact=high for substantive arc work; status=approved with approvedBy=[erik] and approvalDate. lastUpdated bumped to 2026-06-02 ISO 8601 timestamp. meta block totalDecisions advanced 6 -> 13 if present, otherwise no change to meta. decisions array length grows from 6 to 13.
acceptanceCriteria: decisions array length increases from 6 to 13
Each new DEC has decisionId matching pattern ^d-\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-[a-z0-9-]+$
Each new DEC has all 9 required fields: decisionId, timestamp, title, context, decision, rationale, status, category, impact
Each new DEC has approvedBy: [erik] and approvalDate populated
Each new DEC has tags array including rule-promotion (where applicable) and the RULE-id
Each new DEC has impactedDeliverables array citing the relevant deliverable instance IDs from schemas/_instances/deliverables/
Each new DEC has evidence array citing rule instance paths and workflow file paths
Each new DEC has externalLinks array with PR URL and merge SHA
lastUpdated field bumped to 2026-06-02 ISO 8601 timestamp
meta.totalDecisions advanced from 6 to 13 if meta.totalDecisions exists currently
Instance validates against decision-log.schema.v2.json with -r for luhtech-enums.schema.json and definitions.schema.json
No existing decision entries modified
$schema field unchanged (https://schemas.luh.tech/decision-log.schema.v2.json)
version and ventureId fields unchanged

outputs.description: Append 3 FU entries to .roadmap/follow-up-register.json: FU-RULE-PROJECTION-CONTRACT-F5-FUSION-AUTOMATED-1 (P2 open, RULE-PIPELINE-PROJECTION-CONTRACT-1 pending automated tier), FU-RULE-INSTANCE-VALIDATION-CI-ON-MAIN-1 (P2 closed-on-arrival, instance-validation.yml landed in FU-D-1, evidence cited), FU-DECISION-LOG-SCHEMA-V2.1-RULE-PROMOTION-FIELDS-1 (P3 open, future-bump candidate for impactedRules + decisionType fields). meta.totalCount advances from 9 to 12. lastUpdated bumped to 2026-06-02. followUps array length grows from 9 to 12.
acceptanceCriteria: followUps array length increases from 9 to 12
Each new FU has id matching pattern ^FU-[A-Z][A-Z0-9-]+-[0-9]+$
Each new FU has all required fields per follow-up-register.schema.json v1.0.0: id, title, priority, status, opened, openedDuring, scope, blockedBy, blocks
FU-RULE-PROJECTION-CONTRACT-F5-FUSION-AUTOMATED-1 status=open, priority=P2, trackingRepo=luh-tech/schema-registry
FU-RULE-INSTANCE-VALIDATION-CI-ON-MAIN-1 status=closed, priority=P2, with resolution field if schema permits
FU-DECISION-LOG-SCHEMA-V2.1-RULE-PROMOTION-FIELDS-1 status=open, priority=P3
meta.totalCount advanced from 9 to 12
lastUpdated field bumped to 2026-06-02 ISO 8601 timestamp
Instance validates against follow-up-register.schema.json v1.0.0
No existing FU entries modified
indexes.byStatus and indexes.byPriority refreshed to reflect new entries

outputs.description: Deliverable instance lifecycle — spec lands at S4-authored, transitions through S5-in-progress -> S6-staged -> S7-merged -> S8-closed across the dispatch. Per canonical promotion pattern proven across FU-D-2/3/4 and D-COMMS-2.
acceptanceCriteria: Spec validates against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0
lifecycleState populated with S8-closed post-merge
mergeCommitSha populated with actual squash-merge SHA
transitions array captures full S4->S5->S6->S7->S8 lifecycle

preMerge: ajv validate of decision-log.json against decision-log.schema.v2.json passes (with -r for luhtech-enums.schema.json and definitions.schema.json)
ajv validate of follow-up-register.json against follow-up-register.schema.json passes
ajv validate of this deliverable spec against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0 passes (with -r for forbidden-audit-paint-names allOf)
roadmap-sync.yml passes on the PR (validates both .roadmap/ files)
instance-validation.yml passes (no rule or deliverable schema instance changes outside this spec file)
amendment-scope-overlap-check.yml passes (scopeFiles disjoint from D-2 which targets .github/workflows/pr-mergeability-check.yml)
slack-broadcast.yml fires on PR open and merge
postMerge: Slack channel #luhtech-agents-comms broadcasts the merge PR event
L9 operational records on SR are now current with foundation arc + FU block + D-COMMS-1/2

transitions.trigger: Spec authored against verified substrate tarball (rule.schema.json v1.2.0, deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0, decision-log.schema.v2.json v2.0.0, RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 promotion deliverable as canonical shape reference). Sandbox pre-validation passed on all 4 substrate instances. L9 record uploads (decision-log.json + follow-up-register.json) confirmed canonical per Erik 2026-06-02. Hybrid path (c) coverage scope confirmed: rule-promotion DECs + working-model rule FUs.
PROCEED STEP 2 issued; DEC append begun
Three commits authored; PR opened; CI green
Post-merge verification: L9 records on main current; decision-log=13 decisions; follow-up-register=12 followUps meta.totalCount=12; deliverable instance present on main

notes: First deliverable in the L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT 3-deliverable Tier B arc (per 2026-06-02 SR-chat strategic planning). Parallel-mergeable with D-2 (d-2026-06-02-pr-mergeability-substrate-artifact-extension) per Erik direction — scopeFiles disjoint (L9 records vs CI workflow). D-3 (rule promotion) waits for D-2 merge SHA as evidenceClass. Pattern reusable for every future rule promotion arc: L9-reconcile + workflow-extension + rule-promotion is the canonical 3-deliverable shape. The L9-reconcile output establishes that .roadmap/decision-log.json and .roadmap/follow-up-register.json ARE the substrate-bound surface for rule pipeline governance milestones, not optional documentation.
